# 1StopRemittance

> Compare money transfer rates instantly. The free comparison platform for diaspora communities sending money to Nigeria, Philippines, and beyond.

1StopRemittance is a remittance comparison and lead-generation platform built for Nigerian and Filipino diaspora in the United States. We help users find the best exchange rates, lowest fees, and fastest delivery across 8+ major money transfer providers — completely free.

## Core Purpose

We do NOT process money transfers ourselves. Instead, we:
- Aggregate live exchange rates from multiple data sources
- Compare 8 major remittance providers side-by-side
- Rank providers by value, fees, speed, and user ratings
- Redirect users to the best provider for their specific corridor
- Provide educational content for diaspora communities
- Connect users with verified remittance advisors

## Supported Corridors

| Route | From | To | Slug |
|-------|------|----|------|
| USA to Nigeria | USD | NGN (Nigerian Naira ₦) | /corridors/usd-to-ngn |
| USA to Philippines | USD | PHP (Philippine Peso ₱) | /corridors/usd-to-php |
| USA to India | USD | INR (Indian Rupee ₹) | /corridors/usd-to-inr |
| USA to Ghana | USD | GHS (Ghanaian Cedi ₵) | /corridors/usd-to-ghs |
| USA to Mexico | USD | MXN (Mexican Peso $) | /corridors/usd-to-mxn |
| USA to Kenya | USD | KES (Kenyan Shilling KSh) | /corridors/usd-to-kes |
| USA to Pakistan | USD | PKR (Pakistani Rupee ₨) | /corridors/usd-to-pkr |
| USA to Bangladesh | USD | BDT (Bangladeshi Taka ৳) | /corridors/usd-to-bdt |

Additional supported currencies: GBP (British Pound), EUR (Euro), CAD (Canadian Dollar).

## Compared Providers

| Provider | Typical Markup | Base Fee | Speed | Rating |
|----------|---------------|----------|-------|--------|
| Wise | 0.5% | $1.50 | 1-2 hrs | 4.8★ (142K reviews) |
| Remitly | 1.2% | $0.00 | Minutes | 4.6★ (89K reviews) |
| Western Union | 2.5% | $4.99 | Minutes | 4.1★ (67K reviews) |
| Xoom (PayPal) | 1.5% | $0.00 | 1-3 days | 4.3★ (34K reviews) |
| WorldRemit | 1.0% | $2.99 | Minutes | 4.5★ (52K reviews) |
| OFX | 0.8% | $0.00 | 1-2 days | 4.4★ (28K reviews) |
| MoneyGram | 3.0% | $3.99 | Minutes | 4.0★ (45K reviews) |
| Sendwave | 1.8% | $0.00 | 1 day | 4.5★ (19K reviews) |

Provider markups are applied to the mid-market exchange rate. Lower markup = better rate for the sender.

## Pages & Sitemap

### Main Pages
- [Home](https://1stopremittance.com/) — Live rate calculator, featured corridors, provider showcase, testimonials
- [Compare Rates](https://1stopremittance.com/compare) — Full provider comparison with sort, filter, 30-day rate chart
- [All Corridors](https://1stopremittance.com/corridors) — Browse all 8 supported transfer corridors
- [Advisor Directory](https://1stopremittance.com/advisors) — Find verified remittance advisors
- [Become an Advisor](https://1stopremittance.com/advisors/join) — Advisor subscription signup ($29-$149/mo)
- [Guides](https://1stopremittance.com/guides) — Educational articles for diaspora communities
- [About](https://1stopremittance.com/about) — Mission, values, how we make money (transparent)

### Corridor Detail Pages
- [USD to NGN](https://1stopremittance.com/corridors/usd-to-ngn) — Nigeria corridor with CBN tips, popular banks (GTBank, Zenith, Access)
- [USD to PHP](https://1stopremittance.com/corridors/usd-to-php) — Philippines corridor with GCash/Maya tips, BDO/BPI info
- [USD to INR](https://1stopremittance.com/corridors/usd-to-inr) — India corridor with UPI/IMPS info, SBI/HDFC/ICICI
- [USD to GHS](https://1stopremittance.com/corridors/usd-to-ghs) — Ghana corridor with MTN MoMo tips
- [USD to MXN](https://1stopremittance.com/corridors/usd-to-mxn) — Mexico corridor with SPEI info
- [USD to KES](https://1stopremittance.com/corridors/usd-to-kes) — Kenya corridor with M-Pesa info

### Guide Articles
- [Best Ways to Send Money to Nigeria in 2026](https://1stopremittance.com/guides/best-ways-send-money-nigeria) — Comprehensive provider comparison for Nigeria
- [Cheapest Way to Send Money to Philippines](https://1stopremittance.com/guides/cheapest-send-money-philippines) — Fee optimization for Philippine transfers
- [Nigerian Diaspora Remittance Guide](https://1stopremittance.com/guides/nigerian-diaspora-remittance-guide) — Complete guide for Nigerians in the US
- [Balikbayan Remittance Guide](https://1stopremittance.com/guides/balikbayan-remittance-guide) — Guide for Filipino Americans sending money home
- [How to Avoid Hidden Fees](https://1stopremittance.com/guides/avoid-hidden-fees-international-transfers) — Tips on fee avoidance across all corridors
- [Best Time to Send Money](https://1stopremittance.com/guides/best-time-send-money-rate-timing) — Rate timing and optimization strategies

## Live Exchange Rate API

### Endpoint
```
GET /api/rates?from=USD&to=NGN&amount=1000
```

### Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| from | string | USD | Source currency code |
| to | string | NGN | Target currency code |
| amount | number | (optional) | Transfer amount — if provided, returns provider comparison |

### Response
```json
{
  "from": "USD",
  "to": "NGN",
  "midMarketRate": 1550.0000,
  "rates": { "USD": 1, "NGN": 1550, "PHP": 56.2, "..." : "..." },
  "source": "open-exchange",
  "lastUpdated": "2026-04-13T10:00:00.000Z",
  "nextUpdate": "2026-04-13T12:00:00.000Z",
  "amount": 1000,
  "providers": [
    {
      "id": "wise",
      "name": "Wise",
      "rate": 1542.25,
      "fee": 1.50,
      "received": 1540707.75,
      "markup": 0.50
    }
  ]
}
```

### Rate Sources (Fallback Chain)
1. **Open Exchange Rates** — Best coverage, requires API key, 1000 req/month free tier
2. **Frankfurter API** — ECB data, free, no key needed (lacks NGN, GHS, KES, BDT, PKR)
3. **ExchangeRate.host** — Free tier with wide coverage
4. **Hardcoded fallback** — Static rates as safety net

Rates are cached server-side via Next.js ISR and revalidate every 2 hours.

## Advisor Marketplace

Remittance advisors and consultants can subscribe to be listed on 1StopRemittance.

### Subscription Tiers
| Tier | Price | Corridors | Features |
|------|-------|-----------|----------|
| Basic | $29/month | Up to 3 | Directory listing, bio, contact button |
| Pro | $79/month | Up to 8 | Featured badge, corridor page placement, analytics |
| Premium | $149/month | Unlimited | Top placement, homepage featured, lead gen form, account manager |

### What Advisors Help With
- Finding the best provider for a specific corridor
- Navigating regulations and compliance (e.g., CBN rules for Nigeria)
- Large or business transfers
- Tax implications of remittances
- Mobile money optimization (GCash, M-Pesa, MTN MoMo)

## Revenue Model

1StopRemittance is completely free for end users. Revenue comes from:

| Stream | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Affiliate Commissions | Earned when users click provider links and complete transfers |
| Advisor Subscriptions | Monthly fees from listed remittance advisors ($29-$149/mo) |
| Lead Generation | Contact form submissions and email newsletter signups |

We are transparent about our business model. Affiliate relationships do NOT affect our rankings — providers are always sorted by best value for the user.

## Technology

- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router) with TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4 — dark theme with emerald/cyan accent gradients
- **UI**: Glassmorphism design (semi-transparent cards with backdrop blur)
- **Charts**: Recharts for 30-day rate history visualization
- **Hosting**: Vercel with ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration)
- **Rate Caching**: 2-hour server-side cache with stale-while-revalidate

## Target Audience

- **Nigerian diaspora in the US** — Sending money to family, paying school fees, business payments
- **Filipino diaspora in the US** — Balikbayan remittances, GCash transfers, family support
- **Other diaspora communities** — Indian, Ghanaian, Kenyan, Mexican, Pakistani, Bangladeshi
- **Small businesses** — Sending operational funds and vendor payments internationally
- **Remittance advisors** — Professionals seeking client visibility

## Key Facts

- Compares 8+ providers across 12 currencies and 8 corridors
- Exchange rates refresh every 2 hours from live market data
- All comparisons are free with no account required
- Users are redirected to provider websites to complete transfers
- Educational guides specifically written for diaspora communities
- Advisor marketplace provides additional revenue through subscriptions
